transcript.clean_text: the final stage of the tour of Aman taking the Riders from Alm Muscat to the traditional finish at Matra Cornish after three laps of racing ahead a difficult day some Sprint points and some King of the mountains four Riders breaking away van hodon in his second attack of the race for CCC Stein Vandenberg riding for AI dellea mondal Adam DeVos of rally and the final rider in the Breakaway Alexis gurin in his second attack of this year's race as well the advantage growing difficult roads tense times for The Man in the red jersey Alexi lenko three laps to go and the riders in the Breakaway looking formidable and trying to stay away from the pelaton as Stana on the front all the time racing to try and bring the race back together van hoyon using his time trialing ability to hold the Gap barin marid coming to the front to try and bring the race together for Sonic Celli and as the Riders made their way in towards the conclusion of the race Alexander Kristoff abandoned crashing out on the road and unable to complete his 10th tour of Aman slowly but surely the pelaton started to reel in the breakaways lenko staying out of trouble very near the front and as we me towards the Finish Line it was all about the bumping and barging bani unhappy and then the man on the rebounds jao noo took the stage ahead of Sonic Corelli three Italians in the top three lenko in the red Jersey the tour of man won by last year's winner the Podium lenko bivo and herard a great 10th edition of the race
